zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Gould於1472年出生在英國薩默塞特澤亞波洛時，他的父親Thomas Gould37歲，母親Eleanor Staverton24歲。他於1494年與Edith Appleton在英國英格蘭薩默塞特澤亞波洛結婚。他去世於1525年9月13日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Gould于1472年出生在英国薩默塞特澤亞波洛时，他的父亲Thomas Gould37岁，母亲Eleanor Staverton24岁。他于1494年与Edith Appleton在英国英格兰薩默塞特澤亞波洛结婚。他去世于1525年9月13日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gould
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gold
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Meyer, Mayer, Hyman, Ari, Avram, Mendel, Moshe, Shraga, Aviva.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Gold, Yiddish gold ‘gold’. In North America it is often a shortened form of one of the many compound artificial names of which Gold is the first element.

English and German: from Middle English go(u)ld, or Old English and Old High German gold ‘gold’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for someone who worked in gold, i.e. a refiner, jeweler, or gilder, or as a nickname for someone who either had many gold possessions or bright yellow hair.

variants.name: Guild
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Gould was born in 1472, in Seaborough, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas Gould, was 37 and his mother, Eleanor Staverton, was 24. He married Edith Appleton in 1494, in Seaborough, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. He died on 13 September 1525, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Gould est né en 1472, à Seaborough, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Gould, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Staverton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Edith Appleton en 1494, à Seaborough, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Gould 1472 in Seaborough, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Gould 37 und seine Mutter Eleanor Staverton 24. Er hat 1494 in Seaborough, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Edith Appleton geheiratet. Er starb am 13. September 1525 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gould è nato il nel 1472 nel Seaborough, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Thomas Gould, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Staverton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Edith Appleton nel 1494, nel Seaborough, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 13 settembre 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Gouldが1472年にイギリスソメルセトセアボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Gouldは37歳，母Eleanor Stavertonは24歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトセアボロウでEdith Appletonと結婚した。彼は1525年9月13日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gould(이)가 1472년 영국 서머세트 시버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Gould(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Staverton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시버루그h에서 Edith Appleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1525년 9월 13일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gould nasceu em 1472, em Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Gould, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Staverton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith Appleton em 1494, em Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1525, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Gould родился в 1472 г. в местности сибороую, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Gould было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Staverton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Appleton в 1494 г. в местности сибороую, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 13 сентября 1525 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Gould nació en 1472, en Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Gould, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Eleanor Staverton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Edith Appleton en 1494, en Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
